description: Procedure of ḥaliṣa. Two cases, one serving as model. (1) Fulāna bt. Netanʾel b. Aharon; Moshe b. Seʿadya; Moshe's brother Shelomo b. Seʿadya. (2) On reverse side names of persons for whom it was made: Zayn bt. Shelomo; Yosef b. Marzūq; his brother Shlomo b. Marzūq. Written on a tall narrow strip of parchment. (Information from Goitein's index card.)
description_he: נוהל חליצה. שני מקרים, האחד משמש כמודל; כתוב על רצועת קלף צרה וגבוהה
